assertions.assertion: Recommends setting options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false in test configuration
Recommends AddDeveloperSigningCredential(persistKey: false) to avoid disk writes
Warns against hard-coding localhost ports — use factory.CreateClient() BaseAddress instead
assertions.rationale: Shows the wrong pattern (localhost:5001) vs correct pattern (factory.CreateClient().BaseAddress)

assertions.assertion: Mentions the risk of sharing HttpClient or ClaimsProvider state across parallel tests
assertions.rationale: Section 3 covers shared ClaimsProvider state and parallel test bleeding
